_comment: Tracked, in-repo mirror of the MA queue row appended to the external apex_governance/MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json during ANIM-09. The external file sits at C:/Users/Owner/apex_governance/MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json which is outside the code-artifacts git tree, so this in-repo audit captures the row verbatim to satisfy the SPEC DoD claim of durable logging.

location_checked: AGENT_BUILD_SYSTEM/06_BUILDER_AGENT/ live path (only HANDOVER.md + PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS.md before ANIM-09; no SPEC)
row.symptom: Across all six 2026-05-25 builder review transcripts, the file set inlined between `=== FILE: <path> ===` markers consists of WKFL/PRMPT/TEST in every transcript plus SCRPT in the first transcript only. No transcript inlines AGEN-SPEC-builder-integration-v1.md. ANIM-09 verbatim recovery therefore restored 4-of-5 builder artifacts.
row.impact: Builder agent restored without an integration spec. Restoration cert (ANIM-09) covers correctness of the 4 restored bytes, not the agent's R15 closure. Downstream Builder operation can proceed using the WKFL + PRMPT + TEST + SCRPT set (the runtime artifacts); the SPEC is a doc-control gap rather than a runtime blocker.
row.resolution_required: Operator picks one of: (a) locate the builder integration spec from a different source (prompt registry, earlier WO drop, X clone snapshots predating the May deletion); (b) draft a fresh SPEC under a separate ANIM phase reviewed adversarially against the restored WKFL/PRMPT/TEST/SCRPT; (c) declare the SPEC out-of-scope for the AGEN-Builder agent.
